summary: The diff successfully implements all three requirements: multi-page routing with TanStack Router, WhatsApp number update to 7096912557, and Google Sheets booking form integration. All navigation links use proper TanStack Router Link components, the WhatsApp button and footer references are updated to the new number, and the booking form submits to Google Apps Script. However, the Google Apps Script URL contains a placeholder deployment ID that needs to be replaced with the actual deployment ID from the specified Google Sheet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Configure booking form to submit data to Google Sheet at the specified URL with actual deployment ID
missing_requirements.reason: The booking form includes a placeholder 'AKfycbwYOUR_DEPLOYMENT_ID' instead of a real Google Apps Script deployment ID. While the integration structure is complete, the actual connection to the specified Google Sheet cannot function until this placeholder is replaced.
